---
title: "05. 德充、形残与容纳能力"
subtitle: "Embodied Virtue, Deformation, and Receptive Capacity"
date: 2026-04-11
order: 5
categories: [zhuangzi, cultural, omega]
description: "These chapters strongly distinguish surface form from deeper stable value. Fiber structure gives the best formal analogue: many raw presentations can map to one stable image, and surface irregularity ..."
---

**Chapters:** 5, 20, 23, 31  
**Omega Directions:** `fiber-structure`, `fold-operator`, `zeckendorf-representation`

{{< include articles/category_05_embodied_virtue_receptive_capacity.md >}}

---

## Infographic

![category_05_embodied_virtue_receptive_capacity Infographic](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_05_embodied_virtue_receptive_capacity_infographic.png)

## Video

{{< video https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_05_embodied_virtue_receptive_capacity_video.mp4 >}}

- [Infographic (PNG)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/Omega-paper-series/releases/download/cultural-media-v1/category_05_embodied_virtue_receptive_capacity_infographic.png)

---
